title: Deconstructed assembly sourcing + supplier-first lane + AJR purchase gate
reason: Pivot from complete-vehicle marketplace collection to modular component hubs and Tier-1 supplier channels, with a mandatory Acquisition Justification Report before spend.
decision: Adopt Deconstructed Assembly Sourcing: assemble the twin from best-documented sub-system assets under Assembly Orchestrator hubs — never inherit a marketplace vehicle as silo truth.
Authorize Supplier-First Research Lane (LANE_SUPPLIER) targeting Tier-1 docs/CAD for axle, steering, brake, fuel, HVAC hubs — matrix is hunt draft, not verified evidence.
Extend AID schema to 1.1.0 with supplier_hub, ajr_id, match_tri_state, component_coverage_lists, and optional score_claims (RESEARCH_CLAIM/LISTING_CLAIM only until bytes).
Authorize AJR gate: purchase requires AJR with purchase_clearance=CLEARED; visual-only duplicates without new engineering data → REJECT.
Register AID-000009/000010/000011 for M300 axle, TAS65 steering, Hum3D door shell claims; demote SPECIFICATION_READY/SOURCE_VERIFIED/0.9x scores without URLs/bytes.
AJR-000001 and AJR-000002 drafted but BLOCKED / NOT_CLEARED — recommended decision CONTINUE_RESEARCH.
Front axle architecture decision remains PRIMARY_SOURCE_REQUIRED (DT-D037).
Frozen kernel and component-passport rc1 unchanged.
